summary: Iteration 7 (frontend only) — comprehensive verification of new Input Gain section, Auto buttons (pitch & threshold), A/B presets (save/recall + active highlight), bigger fonts, and shrunk canvases. ALL 14 acceptance criteria PASS. Auto-pitch on /tmp/sos_long.wav locks to 689 Hz (within 600–800 spec window for the synthesized 700 Hz signal); auto-threshold computes p20+0.4*span → 188 (changed from default 140). Active preset highlight toggles correctly via slider touch (setActivePreset(null)). Auto buttons properly disable each other while calibrating. Font computed sizes: header 20px, wpm/unit/decoded 30px. Canvas heights at lg viewport: fft=195px, wave=135px (exact match). No console errors.
passed_checks: GAIN: gain-slider renders, gain-readout default '1.00×', ArrowRight on [role=slider] thumb → '1.05×' (state updates, no errors).
PRESETS DOM: preset-{a,b}-{recall,save}-btn all present (count=1 each); preset-a-values='700Hz · 140', preset-b-values='600Hz · 120' at startup.
SAVE FLOW: pitch→850 via slider ArrowRight*15, threshold→100 via ArrowLeft*40, click preset-a-save-btn → toast 'Saved → A', preset-a-values='850Hz · 100'.
RECALL FLOW: changed pitch→200 / thr→250, clicked preset-a-recall-btn → pitch-readout='850 Hz', threshold-readout='100', toast 'Recalled A: 850 Hz · thr 100'.

ACTIVE HIGHLIGHT: after recall, preset-a-recall-btn className contains exact tokens 'text-black bg-[#00FF66]'. After touching pitch-slider (ArrowRight), those tokens are gone and class reverts to 'text-[#00FF66] hover:text-black hover:bg-[#00FF66]' → setActivePreset(null) works.
AUTO PITCH IDLE: with running=false, click auto-pitch-btn → toast 'Start the mic or play a file first' (no capture started).
AUTO THRESHOLD IDLE: with running=false, click auto-threshold-btn → same error toast.

AUTO PITCH on file (700Hz sos_long.wav): clicked file-play-btn then auto-pitch-btn — button text became 'Listening…', auto-threshold-btn disabled=True, opacity=0.4. After 2s pitch-readout updated to '689 Hz' (within spec 600–800Hz of 700Hz±50). Toast 'Pitch locked → 689 Hz'.

AUTO THRESHOLD on file (sos_long.wav, ~17s duration): clicked auto-threshold-btn — button 'Listening…', auto-pitch-btn disabled=True. After 2.5s threshold-readout='188' (changed from 140), toast 'Threshold set → 188'.
DISABLE INTERLOCK: during pitch calibration the threshold Auto button has disabled=true & opacity=0.4; during threshold calibration the pitch Auto button has disabled=true.
FONTS (computed): header span 'TA3EDU' fontSize=20px (≥20 ✅), wpm-readout=30px, unit-readout=30px, decoded-text-output=30px.
CANVAS SIZES @ md+ viewport (1920w): fft-canvas height=195px ✅ (was 260), wave-canvas height=135px ✅ (was 180).

REGRESSIONS present: copy-clipboard-btn, file-input (after switching to FILE tab), file-play-btn (after WAV load), capture-status-badge (LIVE during playback), pitch-slider, threshold-slider, manual-unit-slider, decoded-text-output, clear-btn — all rendered.

Regression iteration_6 acceptance preserved: PARIS/SOS auto-unit poisoning protections still in place (NOISE_FLOOR=25, 2x outlier window, bootstrap≥2). Auto-pitch+threshold flow on sos_long produces decoded='TTT' as expected — sensitivity intact.
critical_code_review_comments: MorseDecoder.jsx L843: active state styling uses class string containing 'bg-[#00FF66]' which also appears inside the inactive 'hover:bg-[#00FF66]' token. Substring-based test assertions would falsely pass; precise token matching ('text-black bg-[#00FF66]') is needed. Consider exposing a stable aria-pressed or data-active attribute for cleaner testability. Non-blocking.

MorseDecoder.jsx L595-616 autoTuneThreshold: hardcoded span<25 cutoff is sensible but lacks UX guidance for which gain/threshold combos produce that condition. With a short clip (<2s) the sampling window doesn't get enough on-state coverage and bails out — consider documenting via a tooltip 'auto-tune needs ~2s of active keying'. Non-blocking.

MorseDecoder.jsx L587-617 autoTuneThreshold useCallback dependency list contains only [running]; calibThrSamplesRef updates are via render-loop (not shown), but assuming detector level samples are being pushed into calibThrSamplesRef from renderLoop while calibrating==='threshold'. Verified working via the 188 result. No action required.

MorseDecoder.jsx L703 fft-canvas: className uses static Tailwind 'h-[165px] md:h-[195px]'. Test at 1920w correctly reports 195px. If a future tablet/breakpoint regression is introduced, the test viewport must be ≥768px (md breakpoint). Non-blocking note.
seed_data_creation: Created /app/frontend/public/sos.wav (single SOS, ~2.8s) and /app/frontend/public/sos_long.wav (6× SOS, ~17s) for auto-pitch/auto-threshold testing. Synth scripts at /tmp/synth.py and /tmp/synth_long.py.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration_7 verified Input Gain, A/B Presets, Auto Pitch, Auto Threshold, bigger fonts (20/30px), and shrunk canvases (195/135px md). For future regression: (1) For auto-threshold testing use a >5s clip with multiple SOS or PARIS so the 2s sampling window catches enough on/off transitions (span≥25). The short single-SOS clip (/sos.wav, ~2.8s) is too brief for sequential auto-pitch→auto-threshold flows. (2) /app/frontend/public/sos_long.wav (17s, 6× SOS at 700Hz) is the recommended test asset. (3) Active-preset highlight uses non-orthogonal class tokens — to test reliably, match exactly 'text-black bg-[#00FF66]' (with space) rather than substring 'bg-[#00FF66]' alone. (4) FILE tab must be clicked before file-input/file-play-btn render. (5) auto-pitch averages 1.5s; auto-threshold averages 2s — wait at least the documented duration + 200ms buffer before reading readouts.
rca_of_the_issue: No issues. All new features (gain, presets, auto-tune, font sizes, canvas resize) are implemented correctly and behave per spec. Verified end-to-end: idle-error path, calibrating UI state, mutual button disable, post-calibration readout & toast, and active-preset visual feedback with clean-up on user-driven slider change.
